name: InsertFeedback
description: Inserts a feedback for the selected site.
postconditions: The system shall notify the successful combination of feedback to the site
The system shall notify the successful combination of feedback to the site
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.
steps: Activate the feature on the issue of feedback.

Verify that the visitor has not already issued a feedback for the site and displays a form for entering the feedback for the selected site. In case the visitor has already issued a feedback for the site selected, activates the use case FeedbackAlreadyReleased.
Fill out the form, selecting one vote and inserting a comment, then submit.
Verify the data entered and confirm the cheide. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Remember feedback and inserts the selected site in the list of sites visited.
